source: Parts Express woofer selection guide + Parts Express product API

quality_levels.H: Full T/S from PE API with exact original SKU match. Re, Qes, Qms, Le, BL, Mms, Cms, Sd are manufacturer-published values.
quality_levels.M: T/S from PE API for a related product. Original SKU no longer returns results; data fetched from a successor or same-model-name SKU. Parameters were compared against original guide values — see per-driver notes for discrepancies.
quality_levels.L: Estimated only. Original SKU returned no API data. Re = 0.85 × Znom (typical ±5%); Sd from baffle cutout diameter (overestimates piston area by ~20%). Qes, Qms, Le, BL, Mms, Cms are blank.

quality_default: Files with populated Qes are quality=H. Files with blank Qes are quality=L unless listed below.

dq_issues.issue: Physically impossible — no real driver has Qts near this value. Likely a decimal-point data entry error. Correct value unknown; datasheet lookup required before use.

dq_issues.file: Peerless by Tymphany OC16SC00-04 16mm Fabric Dome OC Tweeter 4 Ohm.wdr
dq_issues.issue: Physically impossible — no real driver has Qts near this value. Likely a data entry error. Correct value unknown; datasheet lookup required before use.

dq_issues.file: Wavecor TW030WA21 30mm Graphene Dome Tweeter 4 Ohm.wdr
dq_issues.issue: Implausible for a tweeter — tweeters normally have Qts 0.3–2. Likely a data entry error. Correct value unknown; datasheet lookup required before use.

drivers.note: Original SKU 295-363 no longer returns API results. Data from RS150P-8A (295-573), a known Dayton Audio design revision of the same driver line. Parameter comparison: Fs 4% lower (49.1→47.1 Hz), Qts 6% higher (0.32→0.34), Xmax identical (4 mm), Vas 3% higher. Differences are within expected revision range.

Original SKU 264-1098 no longer returns API results. Same model number (HDS-P830869) found at new SKU 264-1007. Parameter comparison shows large discrepancies vs original guide values: Fs +13% (30→34 Hz), Qts +23% (0.31→0.38), Vas −34% (3.09→2.03 ft³), Xmax +36% (5.5→7.5 mm). Source of discrepancy unknown — could be datasheet revision, measurement method difference, or guide data error. Cms omitted: API returned 790 mm/N which is implausible for this driver size.
